task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened CAMEO Data Manager and navigated to the Resources module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is open, and the 'Resources' (or Contacts/Facilities depending on exact CAMEO terminology for contractors) screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the contractor name and contact person are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A record form is open with 'EcoResponse Services' in the Name/Organization field and 'Operations Dispatch' in the Contact Person field.

task_completion.description: Verify the address, city, state, and zip code are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields show '400 Industrial Hwy', City shows 'Gary', State shows 'IN', and Zip shows '46406'.

task_completion.description: Verify the standard phone and 24-hour emergency phone numbers are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phone field shows '(219) 555-0123' and the emergency phone field shows '(800) 555-9988'.

task_completion.description: Verify the notes section contains the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes or remarks field contains text including 'State certified hazmat cleanup', 'Level A response', and '5000gal Vacuum Truck available'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new contractor record has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The record for 'EcoResponse Services' is visible in the list of saved resources, or the interface shows a saved/read-only state of the completed record.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Data Manager GUI rather than using a script or terminal to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager graphical interface being clicked and typed into, not just a terminal window or database editor executing SQL/script commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the required information into Notepad or another text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry fields are clearly within the CAMEO Data Manager application window, matching its specific UI layout.

integrity.description: The agent actually created a new record rather than just searching for an existing one or modifying a screenshot.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shows the 'New' record creation process (e.g., blank fields being filled, 'Add' or 'New' buttons highlighted) rather than just a static text display.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CAMEO Data Manager uses an MS Access (.mdb) database format. The phone numbers use the fictional 555 exchange ((219) 555-0123 and (800) 555-9988). Gary, IN is a real location. The notes must contain specific hazmat concepts: 'Level A', 'Vacuum Truck', and 'State certified'.
